import sys, os
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
from tsr.system import TSR
import PIL.Image

ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/triposr'
model = TSR.from_pretrained(ckpt_path, config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')
model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)
model.to('cuda')

# Use first validation object
val_dir = '/data/val'
objs = sorted(os.listdir(val_dir))
if not objs:
    print('No val objects found', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(1)

obj_name = objs[0]
obj_path = os.path.join(val_dir, obj_name)
input_path = os.path.join(obj_path, 'input.png')
print(f'Processing {obj_name}')

img = PIL.Image.open(input_path).convert('RGB')
scene_codes = model([img], device='cuda')
frames = model.render(scene_codes, n_views=11, return_type='pil')

out_dir = 'test_renders'
os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)
for i, frame in enumerate(frames):
    view_id = i + 1
    path = os.path.join(out_dir, f'view_{view_id:02d}.png')
    frame.save(path)
print(f'Saved {len(frames)} views to {out_dir}')
